def negative_numpy_dtype_mismatch_implicit_cast():
    rule_id = "numpy_dtype_mismatch_implicit_cast"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Arrays are constructed and immediately cast, implying a missing upfront dtype choice."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
